title: Sex & Onmyoji
original_title: 本当はエロい日本の裏伝奇 泡姫陰陽師
overview: An office lady gets possessed by the vengeful spirit of Doman Ashiya and faces off against Seimei Abe's distant relative Seiko with the fate of all of Japan at stake.
